source.idea_entry: ideas/trading-strategy/xsec-drift-regime-observability-2026-07-13.md @ idea-engine main eea4e5b (proposal's own blob link @ 5e094c8812dd083ccd5d75ae5ac291c57888efd0)
source.rotation_slot: the standing ORDER 003 VENTURE rotation slot, round 5, trading half (rounds 1-4: P018 books -> V020 null, P022 trading -> V024 null, P026 trading -> V028 approve, P030 books -> V032 reject); follows V024's own first 'What it did NOT settle' line -- which null arm the lane's real data lives in -- sharpened by V028's LIMITS line 'a bar registered for a regime-switching world should be recomputed under it'
source.hermeticity: fully hermetic per the PROPOSAL 017-033 precedent: every fixture below a pinned constant committed with the sim, zero repo/network reads at run time, ZERO real market bars, no dev-candidate evaluated on any data, the owner-gated post-2026 protocol untouched (P022's harvest-hazard clause inherited verbatim as a contract term)

stream_model.definition: per-bar Sharpe units: x_t = mu_{s_t} + eps_t, eps_t i.i.d. N(0,1); state D mean delta = 1.15/sqrt(252) (V024's matched arm, its committed basket-Sharpe constant), state Z mean 0; vol model IID only by citation (V024 measured the vol axis inert, spread 0.000 -- the P026 demotion precedent)
stream_model.rho_invariance: the reduction is exact and rho-invariant BY CONSTRUCTION: V024 pins the matched drift so the basket Sharpe is 1.15 at EVERY rho (mu_d = 1.15 * SIGMA_D * sqrt(rho + (1-rho)/9) / sqrt(252)), so the basket-level detection problem is scale-free -- asserted as a code-level identity (mu_d/(sigma_basket_daily) == delta at rho in {0.0, 0.3, 0.6}) AND as the rho-invariance gate below
stream_model.chain: 2-state Markov on {D, Z}, geometric sojourns, per-bar stay probability 1 - 1/S, stationary start pi_D = S_D/(S_D + S_Z)

detectors.families: statistic in {SR_w = (sqrt(252)/w) * sum_{i=t-w+1..t} x_i (trailing w-bar annualized Sharpe, PINNED vol normalizer = the true unit vol; the realized-sd variant rides a reporting leg), UP_w = trailing w-bar up-share (#{x_i > 0}/w)} x window w in {63, 126, 252} x threshold position lambda in {0.3, 0.5, 0.7} -- 18 pre-registered variants, all evaluated on the same paths
detectors.UP_threshold: u = 1/2 + lambda * (p_D - 1/2); classify drift-on iff count >= ceil(w*u) (w*u is never an integer at the registered grid -- asserted in-sim, so >= vs > is immaterial)
detectors.classify: drift-on iff statistic >= threshold, evaluated at every scored bar t in [252, T) against the true state s_t
detectors.up_discreteness_note: the exact ceil thresholds collapse some UP variants: k = 33 at w=63 for ALL lambda, k = 65 at w=126 for lambda in {0.3, 0.5} -- a genuine property of the registered discrete detector, disclosed; the collapsed variants remain distinct registered rows with identical behavior

metrics.E: misclassified scored bars / scored bars, pooled over the M paths of a cell (equal bar weights)
metrics.dE_oracle: min(pi_D, pi_Z) - E, the EXACT best-static-prior baseline (the V032 beat-the-best-static discipline); win iff dE_oracle >= +0.10
metrics.dE_always: pi_Z - E (the lane's de-facto always-trust rule) -- reporting-only
metrics.also_shipped: TPR/TNR/BA per (cell, variant) pooled state-conditional; the exact pure-window per-cell error table pi_D*(1-TPR_inf) + pi_Z*FPR_inf (reporting)

decision_rule.bands_registered_before_any_code: in the idea file, verbatim; evaluated in this order
decision_rule.REJECT: ('cheap drift-gating never materially pays -- build no lane tooling; the round-3 registration carries the quantified unhedgeable-degradation caveat, with the exact pure-window ceiling table as the evidence row') iff NO variant achieves dE_oracle >= +0.10 in >= 3 of 9 cells; checked FIRST
decision_rule.APPROVE: ('ship the drift-conditional trust line') iff EXISTS one variant -- the SAME (statistic, w, lambda) across all cells -- with dE_oracle >= +0.10 in >= 7 of 9 cells, stability-reproduced
decision_rule.NULL: anything else -- a legitimate and expected-plausible outcome: the per-cell frontier table IS the citable pin, flip axes named via per-axis pass shares (expected candidates: the occupancy skew |pi_D - 1/2| and the min-sojourn axis), the CONDITIONAL rule is the citable finding
decision_rule.stability_gate: the seed-20260773 leg (M=250, full 9x18 recompute) must reproduce the SAME ruling -- a gate for every outcome

legs_and_seeds.seed_registry_note: seeds 20260772-20260775 allocated strictly above the PROPOSAL 033 registry high-water 20260771

aux.role: self-check stream, never read by any decision number: the rho-invariance leg (M=50)

legs_and_seeds.draw_order: pinned: cells lexicographic S_D asc then S_Z asc, paths sequential; per path FIRST the chain pass (1 uniform for the stationary start at t=0, then T-1 transition uniforms), THEN the return pass (T normals, one uniform each via NormalDist.inv_cdf -- a drawn 0.0 raises = run invalid); frozen legs draw the return pass only (no chain uniforms); the frozen-D then frozen-Z legs ride ONE fresh Random(20260774) stream sequentially; the occupancy leg rides its OWN fresh Random(20260774) stream (the V024 fresh-seed reporting-leg reuse precedent); lag/realized-sd/dE_always ride the main-leg paths and draw nothing

gates_run_invalid_on_any_failure.breach_protocol_pinned_before_any_draw: any gate breach exits 1 and invalidates the run; no tolerance is adjusted post-hoc; a breached run is reported as breached, never re-run against widened bands (the V027/V031 pipeline lesson with V028's gate-calibration lesson applied at design time)

frozen_state.spec: chain held in D (M=500), then held in Z (M=500), seed 20260774: the measured per-variant classified-share must reproduce Arm A's exact TPR (frozen-D) / FPR (frozen-Z) within the pre-pinned tolerances below -- 36 gate points, calibrated FAMILYWISE before any run
frozen_state.tolerance_arithmetic: tol = 4.0 * sqrt(p*(1-p)*(2w-1) / n_scored / M_frozen) with p = the Arm-A exact rate, n_scored = 2343: the per-path variance of the mean classification over n autocorrelated bars is bounded above by p*(1-p)*(2w-1)/n (indicator covariances vanish beyond window overlap |lag| >= w and are <= p*(1-p) inside it), so each tolerance is >= 4 sigma of a bound >= the true SE (hence >= 2.5 sigma of the registered-M estimator, conservatively); familywise false-fail across the 36 points < 36 * 6.4e-5 ~ 0.23% even at the bound, smaller in truth

occupancy_and_flips.spec: main leg, per cell: |mean occupancy share - pi_D| <= occupancy_share_tol_z4_M1000 AND |mean flip count per direction - (T-1)/(S_D+S_Z)| <= flip_count_tol_z4_M1000 (both directions) -- 27 gate points at z=4 with EXACT closed-form variances pinned per cell above
occupancy_and_flips.variance_arithmetic: occupancy count: Var = pi_D*pi_Z*(T + 2*sum_{g=1..T-1} (T-g)*phi^g), phi = 1 - 1/S_D - 1/S_Z; flip count per direction: indicators X_t = 1{s_{t-1}=a, s_t=b} have E = p = 1/(S_D+S_Z), Cov(X_t, X_{t+g}) = -p^2 * phi^(g-1), so Var = N*p*(1-p) - 2*p^2 * sum_{g=1..N-1} (N-g)*phi^(g-1), N = T-1; the runner recomputes both from these formulas and asserts equality with the pinned values

swap_identity.arm_A_exact: SR family: TPR(w, lambda) == TNR(w, 1-lambda) and FPR(w, lambda) == FNR(w, 1-lambda) asserted to 1e-12 on the closed forms (the Gaussian reflection x -> delta - x swaps the two states exactly and maps h(lambda) to h(1-lambda)); UP family: the exact mirror identity P(Bin(w,p) >= k) == P(Bin(w,1-p) <= w-k) asserted to 1e-12 at every registered (w, k) via TWO independently written binomial routines (upper-tail sum vs mirrored lower-CDF sum) -- the exact-in-Arm-A form of the swap for the discrete family, whose confusion transpose holds PATHWISE under the down-share orientation (classify-Z at 1-lambda == NOT classify-D at lambda, tie-free because w*u is never integer, asserted)
swap_identity.arm_S_statistical: SR family only (the discrete UP family's cross-cell transpose is broken by ceil-threshold asymmetry between Bin(w,p_D) and Bin(w,1/2) -- the disclosed reason the MC swap gate is scoped to SR): pooled TPR at (cell (a,b), lambda) must equal pooled TNR at (cell (b,a), 1-lambda) within z=4.5 of the combined cluster-robust SE (per-path residual formula; paired residuals when (a,b)==(b,a)); 9 SR variants x 9 unordered cell pairs x 2 identities = 162 gate points, familywise false-fail < 162 * 3.4e-6 ~ 0.06%

rho_invariance.spec: aux seed 20260775, cell (252,252), M=50: the same eps/chain draws rendered at the rho=0.0 and rho=0.6 basket-vol scales (sigma_ann(rho) = 0.30*sqrt(rho + (1-rho)/9), V024's formula; daily = /sqrt(252)), classified via returns/sigma_pinned, must produce BYTE-IDENTICAL classification bit-strings to the unscaled Sharpe-unit classifications, all 18 variants, every scored bar

v024_anchors.pin: sims/verdict-024-keep-margins-noise/results.json @ sim-lab cd47c0626fb01211fc214125fdbc83b95b8aef5f, main-leg cells (IID, rho=0.3): sbh=0.0 -> q99(G6) = 0.6041012959180625; sbh=1.15 -> q99(G6) = 0.36690217335833175 (machine-read, not transcribed from prose)
v024_anchors.gate: tail-count anchors (the V028 calibrated tail-count precedent): N_exc(phi) = #{Delta_max(G6) values > anchor} among the M=400 panels; gate PASS iff N_exc(phi=1) <= 12 AND N_exc(phi=0) <= 12 (lower bound 0 is vacuous, disclosed; the complementary error direction is caught by the OTHER endpoint: drift wrongly absent at phi=1 inflates N_exc(phi=1) to ~O(60), drift wrongly present at phi=0 inflates N_exc at the phi=1 anchor and collapses q99(phi=0))
v024_anchors.tolerance_arithmetic: the parent q99 is the 990th order statistic of M=1000, so the true tail prob beyond it is ~Beta(11, 990): mean 11/1001 ~ 0.011, SD ~ 0.0033; child count SD = sqrt(400^2 * 0.0033^2 + 400*0.011*0.989) ~ 2.47; band = round(4.4 + 3*2.47) -> 12 (z=3 per point, 2 points, familywise ~0.5%)

gates_run_invalid_on_any_failure.twin_g6_evaluator: an independently written G6 evaluator (direct bar sums, statistics-module mean/stdev, explicit turnover sets -- the V024 twin_eval pattern restricted to G6) must agree with the leg evaluator within 1e-9 on the first panel of every phi point
gates_run_invalid_on_any_failure.twin_decision_evaluators: two independently written decision evaluators -- evaluator A in pure integer arithmetic (win iff 10*(min_num*N_scored - mis*min_den) >= min_den*N_scored, with min(pi_D,pi_Z) = min_num/min_den exact and mis, N_scored integers), evaluator B in fractions.Fraction end to end (win iff Fraction(min_num,min_den) - Fraction(mis,N_scored) >= Fraction(1,10)) -- must agree on every (cell, variant) win flag, every per-variant cell count, and the ruling, on the main AND stability legs
gates_run_invalid_on_any_failure.byte_identity: stdout + results.json byte-identical across two full process runs by external diff; CPython minor pinned and asserted == 3.11
gates_run_invalid_on_any_failure.determinism_replay: first path of every leg regenerated from a captured RNG state must reproduce identical classifications/statistics (the V024 replay pattern)

occupancy_graded_bar_leg_reporting_only.spec: V024's committed panel machinery re-used at its IID/rho=0.3 cell -- J=9, T=2595, period 21 bars, 123 periods, warmup 12, eval periods 12..122 (111), sigma_ann=0.30, cost 10bp per side, the lane's R3 rule verbatim (best-of-6: G6 = {(L,k,mom,eq): L in {63,126,252}, k in {2,3}}, Delta = strategy Sharpe - basket Sharpe, monthly x sqrt(12)), M=400 panels per point, seed 20260774; path-level drift occupancy phi_D in {0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1} as ONE LEADING D-BLOCK covering the first ceil(phi_D * T) bars (mu_d = 1.15 * (0.30/sqrt(252)) * sqrt(0.3 + 0.7/9) / sqrt(252) on block bars, 0 after); measuring q99(Delta_max(G6)) vs occupancy with the chained anchors above; q99 = the left-continuous empirical quantile sorted[ceil(0.99*M)-1] (V024's convention)
occupancy_graded_bar_leg_reporting_only.question_it_answers: does the selection bar move monotonically between the two committed arms, so a partial-occupancy regime reading CALIBRATES the bar by interpolation rather than demanding a fresh null sweep per reading -- reporting-only, cannot flip the decision

reporting_only_legs_cannot_flip: post-flip detection-lag tables: per (cell, variant, direction D->Z and Z->D), lag = first scored bar t >= f (flip at f in [252, T)) with classification == the new state, censored at the next flip or path end; median and p90 over collected lags, censor fractions shipped
dE_always = pi_Z - E vs the lane's de-facto always-trust rule
the realized-sd SR variant: same paths, w-bar realized sample sd (ddof=1) in the normalizer -- the vol-estimation price shipped as a delta-BA column per (cell, w, lambda)
the exact pure-window per-cell error table and the per-axis pass shares
intake_time_decisions_disclosed: D1 window convention: the statistic at bar t uses bars [t-w+1, t] inclusive and classifies the state s_t; scoring t in [252, T) (0-indexed), so every variant is defined at every scored bar (largest w = 252 needs t >= 251)
D2 up-bar: x_i > 0 counts as up (P(x>0|D) = Phi(delta) = p_D exactly, P(x>0|Z) = 1/2; ties have measure zero)
D3 UP threshold in integer form: count >= ceil(w*u), asserted non-integer w*u at every registered (w, lambda)
D4 E pooling: misclassified bars pooled over all M paths of a cell (equal bar weights); TPR/FPR pooled state-conditional the same way

D5 swap-gate scope: the Arm-S statistical transpose is scoped to the SR family with the mathematical reason disclosed (UP ceil-threshold asymmetry between Bin(w,p_D) and Bin(w,1/2) breaks the cross-cell transpose by O(discreteness) >> MC SE); the UP family's swap content rides the exact Arm-A mirror identity + the tie-free pathwise complement assertion instead
D6 rho-invariance leg at M=50 on cell (252,252) (the center cell), aux seed 20260775 -- an identity check, not an estimator, so M is a cost choice, disclosed

D7 lag conventions: only flips at f in [252, T) enter; lag 0 allowed (detector already reading the new state at the flip bar); censoring at min(next flip, T); quantiles over the pooled lag list per (cell, variant, direction) by the left-continuous convention; cells/directions with zero uncensored lags report null

D8 occupancy-leg layout: the D-block LEADS (first ceil(phi*T) bars) -- one block, not interleaved, per the proposal's 'one leading D-block'; the G6-only evaluator is V024's eval_panel trimmed to the 6 G6 configs (identical arithmetic: same prefix sums, same tie rule 'ties by index', same turnover charge, same Sharpe forms), twin-gated per phi point
D9 ceiling-table E_inf = the balanced error 1 - BA_inf (occupancy-free, per variant); the occupancy-weighted pure-window error table ships per (cell, variant) separately
D10 realized-sd normalizer: sample sd over the window with ddof=1; realized-sd variants are reporting-only and share the pinned thresholds h = lambda*1.15
D11 decision evaluator A uses pure integer arithmetic on (mis, N_scored, min_pi as exact integer ratio); evaluator B uses fractions.Fraction end to end; both written independently
D12 frozen legs hold the chain by construction (no chain uniforms drawn) -- the pinned draw order above; their scored window is identical to the main leg
D13 stability leg computes decision numbers only (no lag/realized-sd/swap legs) -- its role is ruling reproduction at the registered M=250
D14 stdout floats formatted %.6f/%.4f fixed-width; results.json floats raw repr via json.dump -- byte-identity is over both

D15 the scratchpad pilot: the runner was debugged on throwaway seeds (990101/990102) at reduced M in the session scratchpad before the committed runs; no committed number was read from the pilot (the V032 disclosure precedent)

model_basis.declared_assumptions: Gaussian i.i.d. innovations around a 2-state Markov drift -- the two states are V024's own two committed arms; geometric sojourns are the neutral persistence choice; IID vol by V024's measured inertness; no fat tails, no drift levels between 0 and 1.15 (the two-arm world is inherited, not asserted -- the two-point gap is the HARDEST fixed-gap version of the distinguishability question, stated)
model_basis.single_most_likely_to_flip_alternative: the lane's REAL sojourn and occupancy structure -- deliberately the same measurement as the NULL-case live probe (the pinned detector run once on the lane's committed dev bars); second-order: smooth drift decay between arms would make every threshold detector look BETTER than the two-point world's worst case near the boundary
model_basis.oracle_baseline_conservatism: dE_oracle compares against min(pi_D, pi_Z), a prior the lane cannot know without the very observable under test -- REJECT (nothing beats even the oracle) is the strong claim; the dE_always table ships so a reader can re-weigh; the registered ruling stays on the oracle bar (the V032 discipline)
model_basis.out_of_scope_by_design: composite/multi-scale detectors (CUSUM, likelihood-ratio filters -- the REJECT-case rescue family, carrying its own sim if routed); trust semantics for the weakest margin (+0.130 stays promotion-weightless per V024 under EVERY regime reading -- restated, not re-run); transaction/allocation changes on regime flips (trust gating only -- nothing here trades)
